radius.$description: Segmented control button border radius (applied to the outer corners of the first and last buttons).

disabled_selected.$description: Segmented control button background color when selected and disabled.

selected.$description: Segmented control button background color when selected.

active.$description: Segmented control button border color when active (pressed).

disabled.$description: Segmented control button border color when disabled.

hover.$description: Segmented control button border color on hover.

selected.$description: Segmented control button border color when selected.

active.$description: Segmented control button text color when active (pressed).

disabled.$description: Segmented control button text color when disabled.

hover.$description: Segmented control button text color on hover.

selected.$description: Segmented control button text color when selected.

_.$description: Segmented control button horizontal padding (small size).

large.$description: Segmented control button horizontal padding (large size).
